title: Rodent Proofing in Prospect Lefferts Gardens | $500-$3,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional rodent proofing services in Prospect Lefferts Gardens, Brooklyn. Protect your home from mice and rats. $500-$3,000. Licensed experts. Free estimates!
intro: Prospect Lefferts Gardens homeowners know that the neighborhood's beautiful pre-war buildings and tree-lined streets can unfortunately provide ideal habitats for rodents. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive rodent proofing services designed to seal your property and prevent mice and rats from entering your home. Our expert technicians provide lasting protection for properties throughout PLG.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Prospect Lefferts Gardens for years, understanding the unique challenges of the neighborhood's diverse housing stock, from Victorian homes to modern apartments. Our licensed technicians use proven exclusion methods and offer guaranteed results with transparent pricing and no hidden fees.
localContext: The charming brownstones and multi-family homes near Prospect Park and along tree-canopied streets like Maple and Midwood create numerous entry points for rodents seeking shelter. Our team is experienced with both the historic architecture around the Lefferts Historic House area and newer construction near Flatbush Avenue, ensuring proper rodent-proofing for every building type in the neighborhood.

faqs.question: What does rodent proofing include in Prospect Lefferts Gardens?
faqs.answer: Our rodent proofing service includes a complete inspection of your property, sealing all entry points with durable materials like steel wool and metal mesh, installing door sweeps, repairing foundation cracks, screening vents, and addressing gaps around utility lines. We also provide recommendations for ongoing prevention and typically complete most homes in 1-2 days.

faqs.question: Why does rodent proofing cost $500-$3,000?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your property size, the number of entry points discovered, the extent of repairs needed, and building complexity. A small apartment may cost around $500-$800, while larger multi-family homes or properties with extensive foundation issues can reach $2,000-$3,000. We provide free detailed estimates after inspection.

faqs.question: How long does rodent proofing last?
faqs.answer: Professional rodent proofing typically lasts 5-10 years or longer when properly maintained. We use commercial-grade materials designed to withstand weather and rodent gnawing. We also offer annual inspections to ensure seals remain intact and address any new vulnerabilities that may develop over time.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on rodent proofing services in PLG?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all rodent proofing work. If rodents enter through areas we've sealed within the warranty period, we'll return to address the issue at no additional charge. Our goal is complete rodent exclusion, and we stand behind our workmanship with guaranteed results.
